auId.description: The ad unit ID '0000000000072345' leading zeros can be omitted.

network.description: Used if you want to make requests to multiple networks in adnuntius.

userId.description: Allows you to set a specific user id in the request.

targeting.description: Targeting to be sent through to adnuntius with the request.

maxDeals.description: The maximum number of deal bids to include. Default 0.

bidType.description: Whether to use grossBid or netBid from the server response as the cpm bid. Default is grossBid.
